message:
fix: bd export crash on zero-time timestamps + stale bd sync refs (GH#2488, GH#2493)

Export: sanitize zero-value time.Time fields (year 0001) to Unix epoch
before JSON marshaling. NULL datetime columns from Dolt scan as
time.Time{} which causes MarshalJSON to fail.

Templates: replace stale 'bd sync' with 'bd dolt push' in agent
instruction templates generated by bd setup factory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ bd ready              # Find available work
 bd show <id>          # View issue details
 bd update <id> --claim  # Claim work atomically
 bd close <id>         # Complete work
-bd sync               # Sync with git
+bd dolt push          # Push beads data to remote
 ```
 
 ## Non-Interactive Shell Commands
@@ -133,7 +133,7 @@ For more details, see README.md and docs/QUICKSTART.md.
 4. **PUSH TO REMOTE** - This is MANDATORY:
    ```bash
    git pull --rebase
-   bd sync
+   bd dolt push
    git push
    git status  # MUST show "up to date with origin"
    ```

@@ -95,7 +95,7 @@ For more details, see README.md and docs/QUICKSTART.md.
 4. **PUSH TO REMOTE** - This is MANDATORY:
    ```bash
    git pull --rebase
-   bd sync
+   bd dolt push
    git push
    git status  # MUST show "up to date with origin"
    ```
